description: Detects map[string]string parameters and fields in Go that indicate stringly-typed configuration. Simplified from Rust: flags all map_type nodes. Cannot filter for string key+value specifically, skip legitimate uses (headers, labels, tags), or check for map[string]interface{}/map[string]any variants.

flag.message: map type detected -- verify this is not a map[string]string/map[string]any config; consider a typed struct instead
